mapper.update: merge into DP_ZC_CONFIG_FIELD_CONTROL a using (select 'TABLE_BUILDTABLE' as NAME, #{userName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} as USERNAME FROM dual) b on (a.name = b.name and a.USERNAME = b.USERNAME) when matched then update set SHOW_FIELD_LIST = #{showField, jdbcType = VARCHAR} where NAME = 'TABLE_BUILDTABLE' and USERNAME = #{userName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} when not matched then insert values ('TABLE_BUILDTABLE', 90, #{showField, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{userName, jdbcType = VARCHAR})
